description: Migrate the Sentry plugin to use SDK utilities: replace manual cookie access with getCookie, replace manual globalThis access with getPageGlobal, replace manual token persistence with getAuthCache/setAuthCache/clearAuthCache, and replace manual waitForAuth with waitUntil.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/sentry && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Migrate Sentry plugin to SDK utilities
userStories.description: Replace Sentry's manual cookie parsing, globalThis access, token persistence, and waitForAuth with SDK equivalents.
acceptanceCriteria: getCsrfToken function uses getCookie('sentry-sc') from SDK
waitForSentryAuth uses waitUntil wrapped to return boolean
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/sentry/src/sentry-api.ts

Context:
1. Cookie access at line 50: `document.cookie.includes('sentry-sc=')` → `getCookie('sentry-sc') !== null`

2. getCsrfToken at lines 60-63:
```typescript
const getCsrfToken = (): string | null => {
  const match = document.cookie.split('; ').find(c => c.startsWith('sentry-sc='));
  return match?.split('=')[1] ?? null;
};
```
Replace with: `const getCsrfToken = (): string | null => getCookie('sentry-sc');`

3. Page global at lines 43-47:
```typescript
const initialData = (window as unknown as Record<string, unknown>).__initialData as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
if (initialData?.isAuthenticated === true) return true;
```
Replace with: `if (getPageGlobal('__initialData.isAuthenticated') === true) return true;`

4. Token persistence at lines 67-98 — replace with getAuthCache/setAuthCache/clearAuthCache.

5. waitForSentryAuth at lines 104-121 — standard polling pattern.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change sentryApi() or any tool files
- Do NOT change extractOrgSlug() — it reads window.location.pathname, not globalThis
- The clearPersistedAuth call at line 209 (in sentryApi error handler on 401/403) should become clearAuthCache('sentry')
